title: panicum aureum
intro: Panicum aureum, also known as golden panic or false rice, is a perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Golden panic can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and poultices, to harness its medicinal benefits.
